questionHeadings: Find what you need
Why Choose Us?
Where our solutions work best
Use Proper Transition Fittings: When connecting CPVC to metal pipes, always use compatible transition fittings to prevent corrosion or leaks.
Don’t Mix CPVC with Incompatible Metals: Avoid direct contact with metals like galvanized steel without proper fittings—it can lead to failure.
Don’t Skip Line Labeling: Unmarked lines can cause hot/cold water confusion and costly rework.
Don’t Ignore Subtle Leaks: Even small drips can signal bigger issues—address them early to prevent damage.

auditedPages.title: Borewell Casing Pipe | Durable & Reliable Groudwater Solutions-Ashirvad
auditedPages.description: Discover borewell casing pipe solutions by Ashirvad. Strong, corrosion-resistant and durable pipes designed for safe and efficient groundwater extraction.

questionHeadings: Find what you need
Why Choose Ashirvad Casing Pipes?
Where our solutions work best
Use clean water or mild soap: Apply clean water or a mild soap solution when joining casing pipes to ensure a smooth and secure connection.
Apply grouting where required: Use grout around the casing, when necessary, to prevent surface water contamination and enhance structural stability.
Install vertically and securely: Ensure pipes are positioned upright and firmly fixed to maintain alignment and steady water flow.
Do not install in inclined borewells: uPVC casing pipes are designed for vertical applications only and should not be used in slanted borewells.
Refrain from using metal tools: Avoid metal wrenches or hard tools during installation, as they can damage threads and weaken connections.
